system.description: An old earthenware pendant that Iskra once made for her mother as a gift, a memento of a rare moment of happiness. Elizaveta tried to dispose of it by throwing it into the old well at the cemetery, but it can still be found at the bottom of the well. This handmade pendant is crude but touching, showing the innocent love of a child for her mother.

flags.location: Old Cemetery - Bottom of the well
